examples: All their songs have a lingering potency.
Is the lingering shadow of the global financial crisis making it harder to accept extravagant indulgences?
Gradually he began to find the sentences lingering in his memory; and soon, to his surprise and pleasure, the whole lesson was mastered!
Mr Obama prevailed despite lingering dissatisfaction with the economy and a hard-fought challenge by Mr Romney.
And, fortunately, our neighbor is doing very well, and there haven't been any lingering problems as a result.
